name: Heart of Artichoke Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring 1 inch of water to a boil. Cook the artichoke hearts, uncovered, for 5 minutes. Drain and purée in a food processor.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Butter a 9-inch bundt pan.
4. In a large bowl, beat oil and sugar together until just combined. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat until creamy.
5. Stir flour, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, cloves, and salt into the oil mixture. Mix until smooth.
6. Fold in the reserved puréed artichoke hearts until thoroughly blended.
7. With a rubber spatula, fold in nuts and raisins.
8. Transfer batter to bundt pan and bake in center of oven for 1 hour, or until a tester inserted in middle comes out clean.
9. Let cool in pan on wire rack for 10 to 15 minutes. Run a thin-bladed knife around inner and outer edges of bundt pan. Invert onto serving dish or cake stand.
10. Dust with confectioners' sugar.
NOTE: For a higher, lighter-textured cake, separate eggs; add yolks to oil mixture. Beat whites until they hold stiff peaks. Fold whites into batter just before folding in nuts and raisins.
